summary: All hard checklist items pass. R1-R5 fully implemented with correct algorithm (iterates caller conditions, not map keys). 12+ tests covering T1-T10. 70 tests pass, 0 failures.
content:
## Review: Implementation of enhancement-resolver-conditional-exports-import-require-browse-spec

**Verdict: APPROVED**

### Hard Checklist

- [x] Code matches all spec requirements (R1-R5)
  - R1: resolve_exports() accepts conditions parameter
  - R2: resolve_export_value() recursively handles nested condition objects
  - R3: Iterates caller-supplied conditions array (not BTreeMap keys) — correct precedence
  - R4: ResolveConfig in jet.config.toml, wired through CLI dev+build commands
  - R5: Unmatched conditions return Ok(None)
- [x] Test plan present — diff contains 12+ #[test] functions (T1-T10 covered)
- [x] Existing tests pass — 70 passed, 0 failed

### Soft Checklist

- Code quality: Clean, @spec annotations on all public functions
- Error handling: Appropriate Result<Option<String>> pattern
- Performance: No concerns — small condition lists, shallow recursion
- Documentation: Doc comments on public APIs

### Notes

No issues found. Implementation is correct, complete, and well-tested.
